step_rationale: Gap-junction protein; structural marker of cardiomyocyte coupling, not atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Connexin 43 maintains gap-junction integrity in the myocardium and is affected by ischemic injury but does not drive atherothrombotic pathogenesis.

references.title: Multiplex quantitative imaging of human myocardial infarction by mass spectrometry-immunohistochemistry.
